description: Spirit World (Pvt) Ltd. Vs Commissioner General of Excise and Others before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Spirit World (Pvt) Ltd. Vs Commissioner General of Excise and Others
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner submitted a duly filled application to obtain a R.B. 4 license under the Excise Ordinance. The Commissioner General, having accepted and considered the same, had sent its recommendation to the Secretary to the Finance Ministry, the line ministry, for its approval; no response. Objection taken by the Respondents was in view of two letters written by the Secretary to the President, which had caused the Respondents to be unable to issue license. Held – the Petitioner is entitled to obtain writs as sought.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
